BTC MIXING SERVICE

ANONYMOUS & SECURE HIGH VOLUME BTC MIXER

  • Enter your NEW BTC addresses here.
    Only BTC addresses are supported.
    Please check the correctness of entered address! The arrival time of your clean coins depends on the delay you chose at the beginning of the session.

  • Input amount of BTC you would like to mix.
    Don't forget that service takes random comisson 1% - 5%
    We advice to set a custom fee to prevent amount-based blockchain analysis.

  • The mixing fee ranges from 1% to 5%
    (the higher percentage - better anonymity).
  • The transfer delay determines how long it will take for your payments to the specified addresses to begin. In general, the longer the transfer delay, the more anonymous your coins become. With large volumes of transactions, a transfer delay of several hours is recommended.

    • Warning!

    Transaction size shouln't be less than 0.003 BTC

    What is Bitcoin mixer (Crypto tumbler)?

    Bitcoin Mixer (Bitcoin Tumbler) is an exceptional service designed to safeguard your identity and preserve your privacy while conducting online purchases. Whether you engage in p2p payments, donations, or any other transaction, our service ensures that your funds are mixed, providing you with fresh bitcoins. Our primary objective is to obfuscate the transaction trail, rendering it incredibly challenging for anyone to trace the origin. For optimal anonymity, it is vital to choose the best mixer available. We understand the importance of maintaining your privacy, and that is why our bitcoin mixing service is the perfect solution. By utilizing our service, you can shield your income and personal information from hackers and third-parties who may exploit blockchain analysis techniques to steal your valuable bitcoins. Rest assured, with our reliable bitcoin tumbler, you can bid farewell to such concerns. Safeguard your assets and personal data effortlessly today by availing our top-notch bitcoin mixing service.

    ABOUT MIXING SERVICE:

    Our cryptocurrency mixing services come equipped with a fair and transparent commission structure, ensuring that each transaction is processed seamlessly while aligning with individual user preferences. Our fees are calculated based on a random commission range spanning from 0.5% to 3%, ensuring affordability and flexibility for all users. Rest assured that our commitment to optimizing your cryptocurrency mixing experience remains at the forefront of our operations.

    WE DO NOT STORE LOGS.

    Our commitment to privacy and security is evident in our approach to data storage. As part of our optimization strategy, we have implemented a strict policy of not retaining any logs. This means that we are unable to assist organizations or individuals with inquiries regarding user activity. By not storing logs, we prioritize system storage optimization, ensuring smooth performance and efficient use of resources. Additionally, this approach furthers our dedication to maintaining user anonymity. Rest assured, your online activities remain private and confidential when utilizing our services.

    WE CAN HELP WITH UNCOMPLETED TRANSACTIONS.

    Our platform BTC-Mixer prioritizes user privacy and security by ensuring that no user data or bitcoin mixing transaction information is stored. We only retain information regarding uncompleted transactions, ensuring that our users' sensitive data remains protected. In addition, it is important to note that bitcoin transactions sent with minimum miner fees might experience a delay of approximately 3 days. This delay occurs due to the lower priority assigned to these transactions in the mining process.

    WE DO NOT COLLECT EMAILS.

    Our mixing service prioritizes the protection of user data and ensures the utmost privacy. When it comes to the contact form, we do not store any emails provided by our users. In fact, we go the extra mile to ensure the complete deletion of your email within 24 hours after it has been opened. This extra measure guarantees that your personal data is not only kept confidential but also promptly removed from our system, providing you with peace of mind.

    WE DO NOT COLLECT PERSONAL DATA.

    BTC-Mixer is a cutting-edge cryptocurrency mixing service that prioritizes user privacy and security. Unlike other platforms, BTC-Mixer employs advanced techniques to ensure that no information regarding received or sent bitcoins, ethereum, or litecoin can be traced back to the mixer or its users. When a transaction is completed, BTC-Mixer diligently ensures that no records or logs are retained, guaranteeing complete anonymity for all parties involved. This commitment to data protection means that your cryptocurrency transactions remain confidential, shielding your financial activities from prying eyes. With BTC-Mixer, you can confidently leverage the power of cryptocurrency without compromising your privacy.

    BITCOIN MIXER IS COMPLETELY AUTOMATED.

    Our automated Bitcoin mixing, Ethereum mixing, and Litecoin mixing service is designed to provide a secure and anonymous process for users. By utilizing advanced technology, the mixer operates without the need for human intervention, ensuring a reliable and seamless experience. Once the mixing process is complete, our system goes even further by promptly eliminating all associated data, leaving no trace of the transaction. This careful attention to privacy ensures that your information remains confidential and protected. Whether you are looking to enhance the privacy of your cryptocurrency transactions or safeguard your financial activities, our automated mixing service offers a trusted solution. With a commitment to both security and user anonymity, we strive to provide a superior experience for our valued clients.
